label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the possible answers. The question asks which statement is suggested by the text. The options are A through D. First, I need to review the passage to understand what it says about Zhao Wenxuan and the film "Wedding Feast." The passage mentions that Zhao Wenxuan became a film star from Taiwan and that he got his break after answering an ad for the film "Wedding Feast." It says that his career change was by chance, and the call he made to the director changed his life. The passage states that he was chosen partly because of his English skills, manners, and willingness to work for low pay. Then it goes on to say that "Wedding Feast" was a hit, winning awards and being shown in the U.S., which made Zhao popular in several regions. So the film "Wedding Feast" was significant for his career. Now, looking at the options: A) "Wedding Feast" is just an ordinary film – The passage clearly says the film was a hit and won awards, so this is not correct. B) The film "Wedding Feast" disappointed people greatly – The passage is positive about the film's success, so this is incorrect. C) Zhao Wenxuan became a famous movie star because of the film "Wedding Feast" – This matches the information in the text, which states that this film made him popular and was a turning point in his career. D) A lot of the Taiwan films are shown in the U. S. every year – The passage mentions that "Wedding Feast" was the first Taiwan film permitted to be shown in
